# Claude Plugins — Community

Read-only mirror of the community plugin marketplace. Synced nightly from
Anthropic's internal review pipeline.

Source: [github.com/anthropics/claude-plugins-community](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-plugins-community)

## Contents

- `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json` — 814 community plugins (registry only, no skill content)

## Installation

```bash
claude plugin marketplace add anthropics/claude-plugins-community
claude plugin install <plugin-name>@claude-community
```

## Related

- [anthropics/claude-plugins-official](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-plugins-official) — Anthropic-maintained plugins
- [anthropics/knowledge-work-plugins](https://github.com/anthropics/knowledge-work-plugins) — role-specific knowledge-work plugins
- [anthropics/financial-services-plugins](https://github.com/anthropics/financial-services-plugins) — financial services plugins
